text: ITC Chairman Sanjiv Puri's remuneration fell 6.8% in FY26 on back of lower performance bonus: Here's how much he made. ITC Chairman and MD Sanjiv Puri's remuneration fell 6.8 per cent to  ₹23.91 crore in FY26 due to lower performance bonuses and long-term incentives

Sensex, Nifty Close Higher as Oil Prices Ease; FII Buying and US-Iran Talks Lift Sentiment. Sensex and Nifty ended higher as easing crude oil prices, FII inflows and optimism around US-Iran talks boosted investor sentiment.

Stock market today: Which are top 10 gainers and losers on NSE & BSE on June 22? Check list. India Business News: Benchmark equity indices bounced back on Monday, with the Sensex rising 291 points and the Nifty reclaiming the 24,100 mark, supported by falling crud.
